title: uncinia erinacea
intro: Uncinia erinacea, also known as Deergrass, is a type of perennial grass found in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Uncinia erinacea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. Uncinia erinacea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
